base_checkpoint_selection: highest unweighted manifest-v4 validation macro-F1 within the pre-frozen four-epoch linear-head schedule
calibration: equal-source weighting across the five declared field validation sources, with minimum temperature 1.5

fixed_thresholds.selection_source: hierarchical_validation_only_v10_candidate.json; thresholds carry forward the preexisting hierarchical_contract_v5.json policy

expected_crop_source_in_product: trusted crop-cycle metadata supplied by the API request
test_disclosure: The immutable test was observed for prior candidates. This contract records only manifest-v4 validation measurements for the validation-selected v10 checkpoint. No v10 frozen-test image, label, logit, calibration value, or per-example failure was inspected before this file was frozen.
